title: Having multiple people under assignee, but only taking away one when moved
excerpt: I can not seem to find a way to have multiple people added under an assignee column, and when one person moves to different column to only have that person removed from the previous column.

posts.author: alexandria.olejnicza (Ali Olejniczak)
posts.cookedHtml: I can not seem to find a way to have multiple people added under an assignee column, and when one person moves to different column to only have that person removed from the previous column.
